steps.title: Identify the line's direction and key points
steps.content:
The line slopes downward from left to right, indicating a negative slope. This eliminates choices A (12.14) and B (0.73), which are both positive.

Read two clear points the line passes through: approximately (0, 12) on the y-axis and (8, 6) at the right edge of the graph.

steps.title: Calculate slope using rise over run
steps.content:
Apply the slope formula: $$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{6 - 12}{8 - 0} = \frac{-6}{8} = -0.75$$

The computed slope of $-0.75$ is closest to the choice $-0.73$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
